pit_intro.title: The Proving Pit
pit_intro.narration: Torchlight and roaring crowds fill the old fighting pit of Karth. The scarred pitmaster offers a heavy purse to any band that survives three bouts against his champions. Sand and old blood crunch underfoot as the first gate begins to grind open.

choices.text: Study the fighters waiting beyond the gates.

pit_intel.title: Reading the Champions
pit_intel.narration: You watch how they move: the goblin warchanter whips his kin into a frenzy, the bog-witch hexes from the shadows, and the pit champion fights for the crowd's roar. Forewarned, you steel yourselves as the first gate opens.

fight_warband.title: First Bout: The Warband
fight_warband.narration: A goblin warchanter struts in beating a bone drum, a scarred cutter snarling at his side. The crowd howls for blood.

ability.name: War Chant
ability.description: A driving chant — an ally attacks with advantage.

pit_rest.title: Between Bouts
pit_rest.narration: The gate clangs shut and a water-boy tosses you a skin and a roll of bandages. You bind your wounds in the brief lull while the crowd chants for the next bout — your strength returns.

choices.text: Ready yourselves for the second bout.

fight_hexweaver.title: Second Bout: The Hexweaver
fight_hexweaver.narration: A hunched bog-witch shuffles in trailing marsh-stink, a slick lurking thing coiling at her heels. She points a crooked finger and mutters.

ability.name: Hex
ability.description: A muttered hex — a hero attacks with disadvantage.

pit_final.title: The Champion's Gate
pit_final.narration: The crowd falls silent, then erupts: the Pit Champion strides out, a slab of muscle dragging a greatclub, a scarred war-hound straining at his side. He points the club at you and grins.

choices.text: Roar back to turn the crowd against him.

fight_champion.title: Final Bout: The Pit Champion
fight_champion.narration: The greatclub whistles through the torchlit air as the champion bellows for his hound to tear into your flank. This is the bout the whole pit came to see.

ability.name: Rally Roar
ability.description: A bellowing roar — an ally attacks with advantage.

pit_victory.title: Champions of the Pit
pit_victory.narration: The champion crashes into the sand and the crowd's roar shakes the timbers. The pitmaster, scowling and impressed, counts the heavy purse into your hands.

choices.text: Take your winnings and your glory.

ending_pit_win.title: Undefeated
ending_pit_win.narration: You leave the Proving Pit of Karth with full purses and a name that will draw nods in every tavern from here to the coast. The crowd is already chanting for your return.

ending_pit_fall.title: Dragged from the Sand
ending_pit_fall.narration: You fall in an early bout, and the hooks come out to drag you from the sand while the crowd jeers. The pitmaster keeps his purse, and the pit keeps its reputation.

ending_pit_fall_boss.title: So Close
ending_pit_fall_boss.narration: Two bouts won, and the champion's greatclub ends the third. The crowd salutes a good fight even as you are carried out — but a good fight pays nothing.
